title: Multi Bintang Indonesia’s net profit grew 28.6% in 9M 2024
body: PT Multi Bintang Indonesia Tbk (MLBI), an alcoholic beverage manufacturer, booked net profit of IDR 762.57 billion within the first nine months (9M) of 2024.

title: Morning session saw JCI weakening again
body: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) slipped down throughout the morning session today (24/10).

title: Sales not improving, Unilever Indonesia saw 28.1% decline in 9M 2024
body: PT Unilever Indonesia Tbk (UNVR), a Fast-Moving Consumer Goods (FMCG) company, booked net profit of IDR 3.01 trillion in the first nine months (9M) in 2024.

title: Supporting Dhoho Kediri Airport, GGRM put in extra IDR 300 billion
body: PT Gudang Garam Tbk (GGRM), one of the biggest cigarette manufacturers in Indonesia, has channelled extra capital of IDR 300 billion to PT Surya Dhoho Investama (SDHI).

title: Q3 2024 saw TAPG’s profit skyrocketed 46.6%
body: The profit of PT Triputra Agro Persada Tbk (TAPG) saw a surge of up to 46.6% year-on-year (yoy) in Q3 2024 compared to the same period in 2023.

title: Multi Bintang Indonesia’s net profit grew 28.6% in 9M 2024
body: PT Multi Bintang Indonesia Tbk (MLBI), an alcoholic beverage manufacturer, booked net profit of IDR 762.57 billion within the first nine months (9M) of 2024.

title: Morning session saw JCI weakening again
body: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) slipped down throughout the morning session today (24/10).

title: Sales not improving, Unilever Indonesia saw 28.1% decline in 9M 2024
body: PT Unilever Indonesia Tbk (UNVR), a Fast-Moving Consumer Goods (FMCG) company, booked net profit of IDR 3.01 trillion in the first nine months (9M) in 2024.

title: Supporting Dhoho Kediri Airport, GGRM put in extra IDR 300 billion
body: PT Gudang Garam Tbk (GGRM), one of the biggest cigarette manufacturers in Indonesia, has channelled extra capital of IDR 300 billion to PT Surya Dhoho Investama (SDHI).

title: Q3 2024 saw TAPG’s profit skyrocketed 46.6%
body: The profit of PT Triputra Agro Persada Tbk (TAPG) saw a surge of up to 46.6% year-on-year (yoy) in Q3 2024 compared to the same period in 2023.

title: Forming new subsidiary, PTRO to seek opportunities in mining infrastructure
body: PT Petrosea Tbk (PTRO) has recently formed a new subsidiary called PT Petrosea Infrastruktur Nusantara (PIN) in order to support business expansion.

title: Reaching new peak, yet JCI slipped again nearing mid-day
body: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) arrived at 7,778.44 at 11.30 AM WIB nearing the first closing bell today (23/10), although it managed to reach new height at 7,800.02 earlier.

title: State sukuk auction reported incoming bids of IDR 17.47 trillion
body: The amount of incoming bids for the last auction of Government Sharia Securities (SBSN) or State Sukuk last Tuesday (22/10) reportedly reached IDR 17.47 trillion.

title: Adiwarna Anugerah Abadi to issue 750 million in IPO
body: PT Adiwarna Anugerah Abadi Tbk (NAIK), a trading and fire protection system service company, will issue 750 million of its shares in an initial public offering (IPO) in Indonesia Stock Exchange.

title: JAWA secured loan worth IDR 1.25 trillion
body: PT Jaya Agra Wattie Tbk (JAWA), a processed tobacco manufacturer, has secured a loan worth IDR 1.25 trillion from its shareholder, PT Sarana Agro Investama (SAI).

title: MEDC to set up buyback of 2 senior bonds
body: PT Medco Energi Internasional Tbk (MEDC) has concluded the buyback of two senior bonds maturing in 2026 and 2027.

title: Deserted by founder, Investree’s license now revoked
body: Financial Services Authority (OJK) has revoked business license of PT Investree Radika Jaya, a company that manages the fintech Investree.

title: Bakrie & Brothers to convert IDR 855 billion debt to equity
body: PT Bakrie & Brothers Tbk (BNBR), a holding company under Bakrie Group, is scheduling a capital increase without pre-emptive rights of 13.35 billion shares.

title: JCI rebounded at closing bell
body: At the closing of afternoon session on Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) today (22/10), Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index arrived at 7,789.07, climbing from 7,764.73 seen in the morning.

title: Lingkar Matra now holds 20% of Communication Cbl Sys Indisa (CCSI) shares
body: On Friday, October 18, PT Lingkar Matra acquired 20.39% of the shares of PT Communication Cable System Indonesia Tbk (CCSI). In order to get the share portion, this investor purchased 244.63 million shares of this high-end fiber optic cable manufacturer through PT Pluang Maju Sekuritas. Next, it was noted that PT Trimegah Sekuritas Indonesia Tbk had acquired 353.80 million shares of PT Energi Mega Persada Tbk (ENRG). This purchase grew Trimegah's share portion in the issuer involved in oil and gas exploration and trading from 12.98% to 14.41%, making it the purchase with the highest volume this time.

title: Net foreign volume closed at 223.65 million shares, staying in green zone
body: Foreign net volume on Friday, October 18, remained consistent in the green zone, closing at approximately 223.65 million shares. This figure was generated from the difference between foreign buying volume (3.69 billion shares) and foreign selling volume (3.47 billion shares). Foreign investors then purchased the most shares of the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) for 853.57 million shares with a net volume of 229.18 million shares.

title: Loan disbursements projected to increase in Q4 2024
body: Credit distributions are projected to rise in the fourth quarter (Q4) of 2024 compared to Q3 2024.

title: CNMA readies interim dividend of IDR 48.16 billion
body: PT Nusantara Sejahtera Raya Tbk (CNMA), the managing company of Cinema XXI theatres, will distribute interim dividend of IDR 48.16 billion.

title: Hexa Prima to become the controller of FUTR via DGF
body: PT Hexa Prima Nusantara (HPN) has become an indirect controller over PT Lini Imaji Kreasi Ekosistem Tbk (FUTR) after acquiring 99.99% of PT Digital Futura Global (DFG) from PT Investasi Gemilang Maju (IGM).

title: Profit growing, DVLA’s interim dividend remains stable
body: PT Darya Varia Laboratoria Tbk (DVLA) will distribute interim dividend of IDR 48.16 billion from its profit in the first half (H1) of 2024.

title: WSKT amends debt restructuring of IDR 26.21 trillion
body: PT Waskita Karya (Persero) Tbk (WSKT) and a number of banking creditors renewed (amended) a debt restructuring agreement worth IDR 26.21 trillion.

title: WSBP losses swell 25.6% to IDR 640.6 billion in 9M 2024
body: PT Waskita Beton Precast Tbk (WSBP) posted a loss of IDR 640.6 billion in the first nine months (9M) of 2024, 25.6% higher year-on-year (yoy) or compared to the same period last year.

title: JCI movement slows in initial session
body: The movement of the Composite Stock Price Index (IHSG) slowed at the start of the initial trading session amidst the inauguration of a number of heads of government agencies on Tuesday morning (22/10).

title: Ending her term, Angle Tanoesoedibjo now takes position as Co-CEO of MNC Group
body: Angela Tanoesoedibjo takes office as Co-CEO of MNC Group after ending her term of office as Vice Minister of Tourism and Creative Economy from 2019 to 2024.

title: Two Estika Tata Tiara (BEEF) investors raise their stake in the company
body: Two significant PT Estika Tata Tiara Tbk (BEEF) investors agreed to increase their stake in this livestock company on Thursday, October 17. First, 109.19 million more shares were purchased through PT BCA Sekuritas by Asia Agri International Pte Ltd, a foreign investor and the controller of 70.59% of the shares. Then, with a share portion of 8.11%, individual investor Edie purchased 12.54 million BEEF shares through PT KB Valbury Sekuritas.

title: Newport Marine Services releases 1 billion shares via IPO
body: PT Newport Marine Services Tbk (BOAT), a company which operates in the field of chartering vessels for the needs of the oil and gas (oil and gas) industry, will offer as many as 1 billion shares through an Initial Public Offering (IPO) on the Indonesia Stock Exchange (BEI).

title: FILM will welcome new investor after private placement
body: PT MD Entertainment Tbk (FILM) will hold a capital increase without pre-emptive rights (PMTHMETD) or a private placement of 216,332,660 shares, all of which will be taken up by PT Samuel International.

title: Mitra Investindo establishes new subsidiary with IDR 2.5 billion investment
body: PT Mitra Investindo Tbk (MITI) announced the establishment of a new subsidiary called PT Karana Mitra Logistik (KML).

title: FWCT secures IDR 100 billion financing facilities from Indonesia Eximbank
body: PT Wijaya Cahaya Timber Tbk (FWCT), a plywood industrial producer, has received financing facilities from Indonesia Eximbank in the form of export working capital credit.

title: Prabowo appointed ranks of ministers of Kabinet Merah Putih
body: President Prabowo Subianto and Vice President Gibran Rakabuming Raka for the 2024-2029 period inaugurated the ranks of Ministers and Deputy Ministers of the Kabinet Merah Putih (KMP) on Monday (21/10).

title: AMOR to distribute final dividend of IDR 27.5 per share
body: PT Ashmore Asset Management Indonesia Tbk (AMOR), an investment services issuer, will distribute a final dividend of IDR 27.5 per share or a total of IDR 60.81 billion.

title: Here are 10 priciest stocks in Indonesia Stock Exchange
body: PT Bursa Efek Indonesia (BEI) recorded 10 most expensive stocks at the closing bell last Friday (18/10).

title: ERAL to put extra IDR 15.73 billion in MST Golf Indonesia
body: PT Sinar Eka Selaras Tbk (ERAL), a subsidiary of PT Erajaya Swasembada Tbk (ERAA) that focuses on the retail business for lifestyle products, has channelled extra capital worth IDR 15.73 billion to PT MST Golf Indonesia (MGI).

title: Shareholders gave a nod to ADRO’s plan of AAI divestment for business diversification
body: Shareholders of PT Adaro Energy Indonesia Tbk (ADRO) have approved the plan of divesting the entire shares in PT Adaro Andalan Indonesia (AAI) to extend the business’s reach to outside thermal coal.

title: Post-IPO, Esta Indonesia to purchase landbank from president director
body: PT Esta Indonesia Tbk (NEST), an issuer recently debuted on Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) last August, has reportedly acquired 6 plots of land and building owned by its own president director, Hoo Anton Siswanto.
